folio.label: 73v
folio.l: Therfore made I , my visitasions
To vigiles , and to processions
To prechynge eke , and to theise pilgrimages
To pleyes of miracles , and of mariages
And wered vp on , my gay skarlet gytes
Theise wormes , ne theise mothes , ne theise mytes
Vp onö my paraille , frette he~ neuäe a del
And wost æè why , for they were vsed wel
¢ Now wol I telle fortú , what happed me
I seye that in the feldes , walked we
Til trewely we had , swicú daliaunce
This clerk and I , that of my purueaunce
I spak to hi~ , and seide how that he
If I were wydewe , sh sh he shulde wedde me
For certeynly I seye , for no bobaunce
ñet was I neuäe , witú outen purueaunce
Of mariage , ne of othere thynges eke
I hold a mouses hert , nat wortú a leke
That hatú but on hole , for to stirte to
And if that fayle , than is al I do
I bar hi~ on honde , he had enchaunted me
My dame taugút me , that sotilte
And eke I seide , I mette of hi~ al nygút
He wold han slayn me , as I lay vp rigút
And al my bed , was ful of verray blod
But ©et I hope , that ©e shuln do me good
For blod bytokenetú gold , as me was taugút
And al was fals , I dremed of it rigút nougút
But as I folwed ay , my dames loore
As wel of that , as of othere thynges more
But now sire late me sen , what I shuld seyn
A ha by god , I haue my tale a geyn
¢ Whan that my fierthe husbonde , was on beere

note.notetxt: 574There is a cross in dry point in the left margin.ODR

folio.l: I wep algate , and mad sory chere
As wyues moten , for it is the vsage
And witú my kercheue , I couered my visage
But for that I was purueiede , of a make
I wepte but smale , and that I vndertake
To chirche was myn husbonde , born a morwe
Witú neygúebores , that for hi~ maden sorwe
And Iankyn oure clerk , was oon of thoo
As helpe me god , whan that I saw hi~ goo
After the beere , me thougút he had a peire
Of legges and of feet , so clene and so feire
That al myn hert , I ©af vn to his holde
I trowe he was , a twenty wynter olde
